race.comment: BEER BARON (5) is capable on his day and wasn't that far away on the line when eleventh over 1115m at this track a week ago in this grade. Ben Looker sticks and can tick the 1410m box today. Leading player. CHICA DEL MAR (6) in leading yard and wasn't disgraced in city class when she covered ground to finish seventh over 1200m at Randwick in Highway class. Ready for this trip third-up and expected to go close. ARCHIE MAXIMUS (4) smart gelding building a solid winning CV. Had to work hard early from the draw and pulled out plenty to gain the upper hand when saluting over 1400m at the Gold Coast. Expected to go on with it now. PRESTIGE GUNDY (2) good type who made a mess of his rivals with a dominant victory as favourite over 1300m at Casino. Nicely placed to repeat the performance.
